data.body: LANDED. Submitted top of chain (change 398) -> all 23 janitor changes (374-388, 391-398) MERGED atomically. origin/main advanced c005f242b -> 1c432ca13, contains adapters/jira/ seam, _deprecations.py registry, ADR 0035 (replicated to GitHub). Epic effete-sanctified-sambar (Janitor Cleanup 2026-07-07) COMPLETE: all 21 children implemented + CI-green (Verified+1 & LLM-Review+1) + closed (16 completion-certified, 5 handled: 2 remediated+certified, 2 force-closed on flawed-AC, epic force-closed on stale-AC). Phase-2 follow-up doctorial-semiironic-wrasse filed+linked. c244 out of scope (reparented to ace2). Unrelated changes 399-406 (plan-review/code-review feature work) left untouched. Full local make lint+typecheck+test was green (4654 passed).
